text_block_list.text:
Gold City has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

One day, Gold City's manager bursts into my
office in a state of panic.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: On the cover of Il Bianco? Me?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Not only will you be the first
representing Japan, it's an incredible feat for any
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
It's a very well-established Italian fashion
magazine! Getting on its cover proves you're a
top class model!

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: And they chose you to be on that cover, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Seriously?

Gold City is speechless. I don't recognize the
name myself, but this magazine must be a big
deal in the fashion world.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I mean, it doesn't feel real at all. So, when
is the shoot?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... About that...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What?! That's the day of the race!

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: That's right. And the cover of Il Bianco is always shot in Italy. They've never made an exception, ever since the very first issue.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: That's why I came in person to see how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? How I feel?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to force you to make a choice like
this. I even considered taking the liberty of
setting the contract up without your input.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, I knew I couldn't do it without
hearing from you first.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hilarious. I've never seen you this excited.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Be serious, City. I know it's a tough decision to
make... but you need to make it.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Which will you do? The photo shoot or the race?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, what do you think? Which should I
choose?
choice_data_list: I think you know the answer to that best.
I think you know the answer to that best.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh, you're right. I've made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll do the shoot, and I'll enter the race.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: What?! I... I was sure you'd pick the race...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I would've a few months ago, without skipping a
beat. After all, I like myself best when I'm on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I also know how much you like me as a model.
And now... I think I can say I do, too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Because they're both me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I won't give up modeling or racing. And that's my
answer. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: But... that's impossible! You want me to tell Il Bianco to come to Japan?!

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Our... job?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
All right. I will try to negotiate a shoot in Japan.
But I won't need your help with that part, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
You give City your undivided support. We can't
make them bring their camera crew all this way
just to see her lose.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Leave the racing business to us. If you can make
this shoot happen, we'll handle the rest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll make it worth the trouble... no, more than worth the trouble for everyone involved.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I believe in you, so believe in me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that? I've never seen my manager
look so flustered.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Am I being too selfish?
choice_data_list: Not at all! If anything, you deserve even more.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hahaha. Don't you think you're spoiling me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If you're sure, though, I do have one more
request.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
We've got an interview after this, right? But you
know... I've kinda got the itch.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Maybe it's the excitement from getting such
a huge job.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But we don't have a whole lot of time. What
should we do?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're the best! Then come to the track
when you're done.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This might sound kind of corny since I'm, like, so
excited, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm running, I'll always want you to be
there watching.
